title: Predictive Industrial Engine
requirements: Score candidate projects based on 'Sovereignty Equilibrium'.
Integration with factory/core/discovery.py for real-time shard auditing.

logic.analysis: Statistical weighting of project metadata (Law 151 compliance, regional focus).
logic.forecasting: Time-series projection of vertical growth (e.g., GovTech, Fintech).
logic.output: Candidate project manifest for the Factory Scaffolder.

compliance.sovereignty: Enforce Egypt/MENA bias in scoring weights.
